namespace GraphQL.Analyzers.Interceptors
{
    internal static partial class ResolveDelegateInterceptors
    {
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InterceptsLocationAttribute(1, "hash")]
        internal static global::GraphQL.Builders.FieldBuilder<global::Sample.Person, object> ResolveDelegate_hash(
            this global::GraphQL.Builders.FieldBuilder<global::Sample.Person, object> fieldBuilder,
            global::System.Delegate? resolve)
        {
            var fieldType = fieldBuilder.FieldType;
            var parameters = typeof(global::Sample.PersonResolver).GetMethod(nameof(global::Sample.PersonResolver.ResolveName), [typeof(string), typeof(global::System.Threading.CancellationToken)])!.GetParameters();
            var param0 = global::GraphQL.Utilities.ResolveDelegateHelpers.BuildArgument<string>(fieldType, parameters[0]);

            return fieldBuilder.Resolve(new global::GraphQL.Resolvers.FuncFieldResolver<object>(context =>
            {
                var arg0 = param0(context);
                var arg1 = context.CancellationToken;
                return global::Sample.PersonResolver.ResolveName(arg0, arg1);
            }));
        }
    }
